hero.title: Fire Risk Assessment & Safety Management
hero.subtitle: Professional fire risk assessments for residential and commercial premises.
hero.description: Kirk & Kirk conducts professional Fire Risk Assessments for both residential and commercial premises to ensure that you comply with your legal duties and meet insurance requirements.

overview.heading: Your Legal Duty
overview.description: Under the Regulatory Reform (Fire Safety) Order 2005, it is your responsibility as an employer or landlord to assess fire safety risks, implement measures to fight, detect, and give warning of fire, plan exit routes, and keep those routes clear of obstructions to ensure the safe evacuation of the building.

features.title: Identification
features.description: Thorough identification of fire hazards present in your premises and all persons who may be at risk.

features.title: Evaluation
features.description: A rigorous evaluation of identified risks to determine which can be reduced, controlled, or eradicated entirely.

features.title: Reporting & Action Plan
features.description: A detailed recording and explanation of our findings along with a prioritised action plan for any improvements required to achieve compliance.

sectors.heading: Who Does the Law Apply To?
sectors.description: The Regulatory Reform Order 2005 places fire safety responsibilities on a wide range of duty holders. If any of the following apply to you, a fire risk assessment is a legal requirement.

steps.title: Site Visit
steps.description: Our qualified fire risk assessors visit your property to conduct a thorough inspection of the premises, covering fire hazards, ignition sources, structural protection, detection systems, and means of escape.

steps.title: Assessment & Analysis
steps.description: We evaluate all identified risks against the people at risk, assessing which hazards can be reduced, controlled, or eradicated to bring your premises into compliance.

steps.title: Report & Action Plan
steps.description: You receive a comprehensive Fire Safety Risk Assessment document with a detailed explanation of our findings and a clear action plan for any improvements required to meet your legal requirements.

cta.heading: Book Your Assessment
cta.description: Our qualified fire risk assessors are ready to help you comply with your legal duties and protect your premises. Don't wait for an incident or enforcement notice.
